GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "How Vogue hosts a perfect holiday party", "Hint: it features a lot of major Tiffany & Co. moments.", "To ring in our favourite season, Vogue joined forces with iconic house of jewels, Tiffany & Co., to throw a festive soiree. Vogue Living's digital editor Yeong Sassall, as well as Vogue fashion editor Pip Moroney and senior beauty and health editor Remy Rippon demonstrate the rules of engagement for hosting the ultimate stylish celebration. The first tenet of luxurious style, according to this trio, is that more is always more. With a heaving table full of bold, colourful blooms, and layered with delicate Tiffany & Co. tableware and glasses (gorgeous crystal Diamond Point pieces, if you were wondering) the dining table becomes a centrepiece of the whole party. Combining practicality with timeless design, Tiffany & Co.'s Elsa Peretti teardrop carafe makes for a supremely sophisticated way to top up drinks. Use it for all manner of refreshments, then leave it out on display. For a truly luxurious experience this summer season, lay a festive table with a knotted napkin (to keep it casual) and a small gift for each guest left in place on their setting. Earrings or rings from the Tiffany T collection are guaranteed crowd-pleasers. Tiffany & Co. also have engravable pieces, if you want a full-scale personalised experience for the lucky guests. The other essential canon of party season is, of course, to embrace the sparkle. Clashing finishes and collections, piling jewels high on top of one another, is a perfect way to elevate a simple dress. Finally, don't neglect the elements of entertainment. For a chic take on classic parlour games, Tiffany & Co.'s playing cards or table tennis paddles bring amusement as well as style. The brand's famously cool take on novel bits like yoyos, harmonicas, whistles and crazy straws also make perfect gifting for any discerning recipient, including you."
